'''Kerek Stele''' was the father of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and husband of [[Marina Stele]].

==Biography==
Kerek was a famous [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] on [[Kuan]] during the war with the [[Bordal]]i. He was abducted by Bordali agents who hoped to make him assist them in the war.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{1stm}}
